37typedef enum {
38 DIRECTION_NONE,
39 DIRECTION_INPUT,
40 DIRECTION_OUTPUT
41} direction_t;
42
44typedef struct {
45 const char* name;
46 const char* description;
47 direction_t direction;
48 capabilities_t* capabilities;
49} stream_t;
50
58static inline void stream_inspect(const stream_t* stream, int (*print_func)(const char*, ...), const char* indent) {
59 (void)print_func("%sName: %s\n", indent, stream->name);
60 (void)print_func("%sDescription: %s\n", indent, stream->description);
61 (void)print_func("%sDirection: %d\n", indent, stream->direction);
62 capabilities_inspect(stream->capabilities, print_func, indent);
63}
64
65#ifdef __cplusplus
66}
67#endif
68
69#endif // MEDIA_C_STREAM_H_
capabilities.h
Capabilities (list of property sets) for media streams.
capabilities_inspect
static void capabilities_inspect(const capabilities_t *caps, int(*print_func)(const char *,...), const char *indent)
